TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 9, Brahim Ghali, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1949) mrhuw West sahara ta' misuw hya' ga Brahim Ghali, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Brahim Ghali htagan beh sa Smara, Spanish Sahara. kawas tay 1960, Ghali tmwang rasaw hetay mnaki Spanish. suruw lga musa Smara mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤rańßim …£ńßali, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw wes~…ēt s~…ēańßara ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤rańßim …£ńßali, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan nja ő≤rańßim …£ńßali ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa s~…ēmara, s~…ēpanis~…ēńß s~…ēańßara. kawas~…ē taj ****, …£ńßali tmwaŇč ras~…ēaw ńßetaj mnaki s~…ēpanis~…ēńß. s~…ēuruw l…£a mus~…ēa s~…ēmara mtzjaw. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 9, Brahim Ghali, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1949) mrhuw West sahara ta' misuw hya' ga Brahim Ghali, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Brahim Ghali htagan beh sa Smara, Spanish Sahara. kawas tay 1960, Ghali tmwang rasaw hetay mnaki Spanish. suruw lga musa Smara mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
